bead.title: runs detail: /runs/:runId with work/try/run rendering and breadcrumbs
bead.description:
Build the run detail page at /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/runs/:runId.

Rendering by layer:
- work: shows queueInputs, stopCondition, list of child try records with status and beadId
- try: shows beadId (linked to bead detail), baseRevision, resultRevision, worktreePath, mergeOutcome, checkResults summary, list of child run records
- run: shows promptSummary, power bounds (min/max), harness/provider/model, tokensIn/Out, costUsd, durationMs, outputExcerpt, evidence links

Breadcrumbs:
- work detail: Runs > [work id]
- try detail: Runs > [work id] > [try id]  (work id is a link back)
- run detail: Runs > [work id] > [try id] > [run id]  (both links back)
- Back button always works correctly (history.back() not pushState)

Returns to run list with filter state preserved when navigating Back from any detail level.

Depends on ddx-a1d0b136 (runs list).
bead.acceptance:
1. Work detail renders queueInputs, stopCondition, child try list.
2. Try detail renders beadId link, revisions, worktreePath, mergeOutcome, child run list.
3. Run detail renders all execution signals (power, harness, provider, model, tokens, cost, duration, output excerpt, evidence links).
4. Breadcrumbs render at every level with correct parent links.
5. Each breadcrumb link navigates to the parent record without full page reload.
6. Back from detail restores runs list with same filter state (URL params intact).
